title: Guest Chamber Turnover
desc: Travelers checked out at dawn. Their room still has to be made ready for whoever gets lost into it next.

steps.text:
Castle Bodhran's guest chambers are perfectly comfortable once you stop comparing them to ordinary rooms. Beds are secured to wall studs. Washstands are mounted in corners that only make sense from inside the chamber. Closets open downward into spaces that would be side alcoves anywhere else.

A caravan party left at dawn, and the chamber steward wants room seven turned over before dusk. She opens the door, steps in, and remains right-side up even when the room promptly decides the far wall is now the floor. "See? Fine," she says, as if that settles anything. One bed still needs fresh linen. The washstand basin is half full, and someone's travel straps are hanging from a ceiling hook that was almost certainly a wall hook earlier.

"Strip and relace the bedding," the steward says, handing you folded linens. "Or clear the washstand and reset the trunks before the next travelers arrive. I only need the room to look welcoming. Sensible is beyond our budget."

options.label: Strip the bed and relace the fresh linens
Reset the washstand and secure the room's storage

steps.text:
The bed is fixed to a frame of polished wood and leather straps, which means making it is part housekeeping, part ship rigging. You unlace the old blankets, shake out the mattress pad, and thread the clean linen through the side loops while bracing your knees against what would normally be a headboard.

The steward assists by passing pins and keeping the top cover square while the room quietly refuses to behave like any decent room should. Once the final strap is tightened, the bed settles into neat order - smooth blanket, tucked corners, pillow secured so it will remain exactly where a tired traveler needs it whether the room chooses to be vertical, horizontal, or argumentative.

The steward presses one hand to the finished coverlet and nods. "Good. Guests will forgive a strange castle before they'll forgive untidy sheets." She says this with the confidence of long experience. Given Castle Bodhran's reputation, she is probably right.

options.label: Step back and leave the bed ready for the next arrival

steps.text:
The washstand has to be emptied carefully because the basin drain currently opens toward a channel that is, from your perspective, on the room's side wall. You pour off the used water, wipe the stone bowl dry, and polish the brass taps until they stop looking offended by humidity. Then you turn to the trunks and storage hooks.

Castle Bodhran rooms are generous with hooks because travelers are constantly setting belongings down in places that become impractical a minute later. You retie the hanging straps, move one trunk back against its retaining rail, and recover a dropped boot from the narrow shelf under the window. By the time you finish, the room looks orderly in every direction at once - washstand clean, trunks secure, travel gear no longer threatening to become part of the ceiling.

The steward takes a slow look around and smiles despite herself. "Excellent. Now it looks like somewhere a person might choose to stay, rather than a puzzle they lost an argument with."

options.label: Leave the chamber cleaner than geometry deserves
